name: INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS MACHINES CORP
summary: International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) provides hybrid cloud and artificial intelligence (AI) technology solutions to enterprise clients. IBM operates through Software, Consulting, Infrastructure, and Financing segments. Its offerings include hybrid cloud platforms, AI tools, business consulting, systems integration, application development, mission-critical server and storage infrastructure, and client financing. IBM serves clients globally, helping them with digital transformation, workflow modernization, and operational efficiency.

products.name: Hybrid Cloud Platform
products.description: Platform enabling clients to manage applications and data across hybrid cloud environments.

products.name: AI Technology
products.description: AI solutions supporting digital transformation and critical workflow automation at scale.

products.name: Server and Storage Solutions
products.description: On-premises and cloud-based server and storage systems designed for mission-critical and AI workloads.

products.name: IBM Consulting Services
products.description: Business consulting, systems integration, application development, and business process outsourcing services.

products.name: Client and Commercial Financing
products.description: Financing solutions facilitating client acquisition of IBM hardware, software, and services.
